description: Accounting Method for non-failure mergers where survivor is domestic/private bank, trust co, or industrial bank
notes: Applies when survivor CHTR_TYPE_CD is 200/250/340; see code list ACCT_METHOD

description: RSSD ID of Predecessor: entity transformed by the TRNSFM_CD event; in a merger the non-survivor
notes: Column name is ID_RSSD_PRECESSOR (Fed's spelling) though dictionary prose says "PREDECESSOR"; joins to Attributes ID_RSSD; primary-key component

description: RSSD ID of Successor: entity that comes into / continues existence; in a merger the survivor
notes: Joins to Attributes ID_RSSD; primary-key component
See code list TRNSFM_CD; 50 = failure with government assistance
